ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the subject (e.g., subject-02) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the subject */,
  "subject_type" TEXT /* Type of subject (e.g., student, professional) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for follow-ups */,
  "consent_form" INTEGER /* Indicates if the subject has signed a consent form */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health issues that might affect performance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the subject was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the subject's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject participating in the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date when the session was conducted */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* Location where the session was conducted */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., training, test) */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Total duration of the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., completed, in progress, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the session's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Number of the trial within the session */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the subject in seconds */,
  "object_response" TEXT /* Object response given by the subject */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category of the image shown */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition under which the image was shown */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image shown during the trial */,
  "trial_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the trial */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations during the trial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the trial was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the trial's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., airplane, elephant) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., living, non-living) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the condition (e.g., c30) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., lighting, noise) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the condition's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image file was uploaded */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the image belongs to */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition under which the image is presented */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., natural, artificial) */,
  "image_source" TEXT /* Source of the image */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the image's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the user accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Number of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the version's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_versions" (
  "session_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session version */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment version used */,
  "version_used_date" TEXT /* Date the version was used in the session */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version used in the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the session version's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_versions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES experiment_versions ("version_id")
)
